hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty'); case "$f" in *_instructor.ipynb) bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/sync_instructor_md.sh" "$f" >&2 ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty'); case "$f" in */notebooks/student/nb*_student.ipynb) python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/update_schedule_badges.py" >&2; "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.venv/bin/python" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/voice_lint_notebooks.py" "$f" >&2 || echo 'voice lint FAILED — fix before committing' >&2 ;; esac
